evidence: "For a mesh of documentary/thriller/horror, this was a very well done movie that kept me captivated all the way through."
"At the end of the day, it's just another horror flick meant to cater to the teens and college kids..."
"Good plot for a horror/suspense film, but the execution in unraveling it wasn't impressing"
"...the final 15 minutes of this movie throw a big wrench in this film and rob of it of a full 5 star rating"
"...if you're looking for a horror film that will entertain you for a few hours and give you the heebie jeebies here and there..."
"...it obviously cannot hold a candle to other films produced by Blumhouse such as The Purge, Paranormal Activity, Get Out..."
"...the performances are fairly good as I believe each character portrayed their role to the best degree possible."
"Quentin Tarantino's creativity and Robert Rodriguez's directing skills meshed well to put together this classic masterpiece."
"...the demonic clown-like smiles the characters in this film give off when they're possessed by the entity of the game had my the hairs on my head standing up."
"...there really aren't any lovable or relatable characters in here, so don't expect to become emotionally attached to any of them."
"...if you want a horror film that will just completely blow you away, take a pass on it."

summary: The user enjoys horror and thriller genres, often appreciating fast-paced narratives with graphic elements. They show a preference for entertainment value over production quality and do not exhibit strong loyalty to specific creators.
